remaining_params.StackDescription: Put four +1/+1 counters, a flying counter, a vigilance counter, a trample counter, and a lifelink counter on that creature.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Choose target creature. Put four +1/+1 counters, a flying counter, a vigilance counter, a trample counter, and a lifelink counter on that creature. Activate only as a sorcery.
